$comment: The schema does not enforce inclusion or domain-specific field-type rules; these should be validated by the application.
title: Field
description: A field or variable in a cross-sectional, repeated measurements, or longitudinal tabular dataset.

label.title: Label
label.description: A short, stable, user-friendly identifier for the field. Used as a readable substitute for UUIDs, or alongside them in interfaces, logs, and references. Must contain only letters, numbers, or underscores. *Length*: 2-75 characters.

description.title: Description
description.description: Brief description of the field. Used for providing clinical definition of the field. *Maximum length*: 5,000 characters.

dataType.title: Data Type
dataType.description: Data type of the field. Must be one of `integer`, `float`, `date`, `datetime`, or `string`.

dateFormat.title: Date/Datetime Format
dateFormat.description: String format for `date` and `datetime` fields. *Maximum length*: 255 characters.

oneOf.description: Measurement type or scale of the field. 1. Categorical fields. `nominal`-- unordered categories. Assign codes starting from 1, in alphabetical order. `ordinal` -- ordered categories. Start with 1; use 0 only if a 'none' or baseline category exists. `binary`-- two-category data. 2. Numeric fields. `discrete` -- countable values. `continuous` -- measurable quantities. Set the field to `other` if none of the above types apply. Set the field to `not applicable` if the field is not of measurement type such as subject identifier. Set the field to `null` if the measurement type cannot be determined, i.e. the information is missing.

role.title: Intended Role
role.description: The intended analytical role of the field in modeling or data processing. `target`: the outcome to be predicted; `feature`: predictor, independent or explanatory variable. Set the field to `null` if the role is unknown.

categories.title: Integer-Coded Categories
categories.description: A list of unique categories of a nominal, ordinal, or binary variable. *Number of categories*: 1-10,000.

missingValueCode.title: Missing Value Code
missingValueCode.description: A single code used to represent missing values in the field, either as an integer or a string. String values may include letters, numbers, forward slashes, underscores, hyphens, or spaces. *Maximum length*: 25 characters. Set to `null` if the missing values are present but the missing value code is unknown. Omit if the field has no missing values.

resources.title: Resources
resources.description: A list of URLs or file references related to the measurement or construction of the field. *Maximum number* of items: 1000. Set to `null` if relevant resources exist but cannot be retrieved or shared. Omit if not relevant.

fieldType.title: Field Type
fieldType.description: One of the pre-specified types of field for special fields: `subject_id` -- subject identifier field; `baseline_indicator` -- binary field that indicates whether the measurement was taken at baseline, 1 -- baseline, 0 -- follow-up; `index_timestamp` --  field that indicates the date and/or time of the measurement; `temporal_order` -- field that indicates integer time index of the measurement if the actual timestamp cannot be provided; `path` -- field that indicates that its data is a directory or a file path. Note, this list might be extended in the future.

tags.title: Clinical Concept Tags
tags.description: Clinical concept tags associated with the field.

examples.label: SystolicBloodPressure
examples.description: Systolic blood pressure measured at ICU admission.

examples.label: ImageFile
examples.description: Path to the associated image file.
